apropos_of_nothing.query: "oyster shucking championship" OR "oyster shucking contest" OR "world oyster shucking"

source.name: blogTO
source.title: OOF Presents: The Ontario Oyster Shucking Championship

en.summary: The Ontario Oyster Shucking Championship is a competitive event where participants race to shuck oysters.
en.why_irrelevant: It is a local food contest completely unrelated to current major news topics.

zh.summary: 安大略牡蛎开壳锦标赛是一项参赛者竞相开壳的竞技活动。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是一个与当前主要新闻完全无关的本地食品竞赛。

brief: Tariffs dominate the news, with small businesses suing the Trump administration and new duties threatening trade wars. In AI, Anthropic releases Opus 5 and Meta upgrades its chatbot.
news_summary: Small businesses sue over Trump's latest tariffs; Argentines defend their nation after World Cup criticism; Canada opens Gordie Howe bridge amid US tensions; multiple incidents in West Bank, Ireland, and London. Trump threatens EU tariffs over tech fines, and US strikes Iran as conflicts escalate.
papers_summary: Research on AI usability for conversational advisors, creative writing with smart glasses, and accessibility for deaf students highlight human-centered computing. Data visualization and benchmarking of multimodal LLMs are also featured.

en.brief: Tariffs dominate the news, with small businesses suing the Trump administration and new duties threatening trade wars. In AI, Anthropic releases Opus 5 and Meta upgrades its chatbot.
en.news_summary: Small businesses sue over Trump's latest tariffs; Argentines defend their nation after World Cup criticism; Canada opens Gordie Howe bridge amid US tensions; multiple incidents in West Bank, Ireland, and London. Trump threatens EU tariffs over tech fines, and US strikes Iran as conflicts escalate.
en.papers_summary: Research on AI usability for conversational advisors, creative writing with smart glasses, and accessibility for deaf students highlight human-centered computing. Data visualization and benchmarking of multimodal LLMs are also featured.

zh.brief: 美国对60个贸易伙伴加征关税，指控强迫劳动，涵盖中国和台湾；白宫指控中国AI公司窃取技术；香港出版环境持续收紧；同时，深夜频繁醒来有科学解释。
zh.news_summary: 美国以强迫劳动为由对60个贸易伙伴加征10%-12.5%关税，涉及中国、台湾等经济体；白宫指控中国AI公司月之暗面通过蒸馏Anthropic技术开发K3模型；香港出版环境变化引发关注；研究解释为何常在凌晨三点醒来。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无优先论文，但英文论文涉及AI辅助写作、AR无障碍、数据可视化等领域，包括可穿戴AI用于写作、智能眼镜辅助听障学生等研究。

todays_image.caption: The clustered seed heads of *Juncus capitatus* resemble small businesses banding together, pushing back against the trade barriers that threaten their growth.
todays_image.title: Juncus capitatus Weigel
